title: Anchovy Toast Delight
description: A tangy and gooey meal prep dish featuring dairy-free-friendly anchovy fillets on toasted bread.

ingredients.name: Avocado Mash
ingredients.amount: A small mashed avocado spread on toast

ingredients.name: Sesame Seeds
ingredients.amount: Lightly sprinkled on top of toast

instructions: Toast the bread slices to your desired crispness.
In a shallow dish, mix together Dijon Mustard and Avocado Mash until well combined.
Place each slice of toasted bread in the mustard-mashed avocado mixture. Ensure it's evenly coated.
Top each sandwich with an anchovy fillet.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top of each sandwich to add a crunchy texture.
